notes: Chunk 69 DONE (Template D, Tier B, 25 new routes): Lebanon/Rwanda/Uganda/Armenia/Georgia/Azerbaijan/Kazakhstan to United Arab Emirates (7, closing the UAE gap left after chunks 67-68); Estonia/Latvia/Lithuania/Slovenia to United Arab Emirates (4, EU-member low-risk UAE entry, no titre test); Dominican Republic and Jamaica to United Arab Emirates (2, unlisted-country UAE entry, titre test required with no fixed post-draw wait, unlike the EU's 90-day rule); Estonia/Latvia/Lithuania/Slovenia to Greece (4) and Dominican Republic/Jamaica to Greece (2, intra-EU vs unlisted-country contrast, Jamaica keeps its EU Group 2 titre exemption); Dominican Republic and Jamaica to Ireland (2, TRACES pre-notification applies to both regardless of the Jamaica titre exemption); Slovenia to Portugal/Czech Republic/Poland/Hungary (4, intra-EU, Hungary and Czech Republic routes note driving as a practical alternative to flying given the short distance). The UAE's MOCCAE import rules are a genuine departure from the EU pattern used throughout this build: a rabies antibody titre test is required from unlisted-risk countries, but with no fixed waiting period after the blood draw, only a 365-day validity on the result, and a 90-day-validity import permit filed online before travel. Confirmed via web search that EU member states are treated as UAE low-risk (no titre test), matching the UK's existing classification. Blog Day 26 replaced in place: uk-to-germany-pet-transport-guide.md, drive vs fly cost comparison (Eurotunnel/DFDS/P&O vs Lufthansa cargo via Frankfurt, Munich transit restriction noted). Next: Chunk 70 (Template E, Tier B).

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
